shot_burst.name: Shot Burst
shot_burst.description: Setup/Builder: A rapid burst from an automatic pistol. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Ammo Pip.

tech_mark.name: Tech Mark
tech_mark.description: Setup: Paint the target with a tracking laser. Generates 1 Ammo Pip and applies [Marked].

satellite_beam.name: Satellite Beam
satellite_beam.description: Payoff: Call down a beam from orbit. Consumes 5 Ammo Pips to deal massive Magic damage in an AOE.

ballistic_barrage.name: Ballistic Barrage
ballistic_barrage.description: Payoff: A continuous stream of lead. Consumes 3 Ammo Pips to deal high Physical damage to a single target.

auto_barrier.name: Auto Barrier
auto_barrier.description: Defense: An automated defensive drone generates a field around you. Reduces incoming damage by 30%.

recharge_protocol.name: Recharge
recharge_protocol.description: Defense: Shift systems to life support. Restores 10% HP and 50 Stamina.

rocket_jump.name: Rocket Jump
rocket_jump.description: Mobility: Launch yourself to an adjacent room, knocking back all enemies at your takeoff site.

drone_swarm.name: Drone Swarm
drone_swarm.description: Utility/Signature: Dozens of small drones harass every enemy in the zone for 30 ticks, dealing constant damage and reducing Evasion.

machinist_physiology.name: Machinist Physiology
machinist_physiology.description: Passive: Gadget Master. Your Ammo capacity is increased by 20% and your items have 10% reduced cooldown.
